positive: A stylized, minimalist composition featuring a vibrant cosmic nebula intertwined with geometric celestial bodies. The main subject is a central, ethereal golden nebula forming a delicate, abstract silhouette, surrounded by sharp, contrasting deep indigo and electric cyan star clusters. Include small, scattered bioluminescent orbs of light (like abstract constellations) and elegant planetary rings encircling the central nebula. The artwork must have clean lines, high contrast, and a visually balanced, symmetrical arrangement suitable for textile printing. Style: Modern vector illustration meets deep space abstract art. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic chiaroscuro effect. Color: Dominant palette of royal indigo, cyan, gold, and black. Composition: Central, repeating motif ideal for placement on apparel.
negative: blurry, low detail, signature, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, muddy, messy, sketch, photorealistic, messy background, disfigured
